heading: Administration
label: 460vv–3 Administration
text: Subject to valid existing rights, each wilderness area designated by shall be administered by the Secretary of Agriculture in accordance with the provisions of the Wilderness Act of 1964 [ et seq.] governing areas designated by that Act as wilderness areas, except that with respect to any area designated in , any reference in such provisions to the effective date of the Wilderness Act of 1964 shall be deemed to be a reference to the effective date of this subchapter.section 460vv–1 of this title16 U.S.C. 1131section 460vv–1 of this title
notes: References in TextThe Wilderness Act of 1964, referred to in text, probably means the Wilderness Act, , , , which is classified generally to chapter 23 (§ 1131 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub.
